headline: CEG Stock Underperforms Industry in Past 3 Months: How to Play?
summary: Constellation Energy's shares slip on delay in power plant restart and no new data-center deals, even as the Calpine acquisition adds capacity.

headline: CEG Stock Rises Premarket: Trump Administration Delays Closure Of Two Pennsylvania Power Plants
summary: U.S. Secretary of Energy Chris Wright issued an emergency order on Thursday directing PJM Interconnection, alongside Constellation Energy, to keep two units of the Eddystone Generating Station in Pennsylvania operational.

raw.headline: CEG Stock Rises Premarket: Trump Administration Delays Closure Of Two Pennsylvania Power Plants
